summary: Iteration 38 - Bug Fix Verification: All 16 tests passed. Verified three critical bug fixes: (1) Password NOT getting reset on server restart, (2) Documents showing correctly in ESS mobile app with file_url field, (3) Salary data persisting correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIX #1 VERIFIED: auto_fix_password_hashes() now only fixes corrupted/missing hashes, not valid custom passwords
BUG FIX #2 VERIFIED: ESS documents endpoint correctly maps document_url to file_url (line 51 in routes_ess/documents.py)
BUG FIX #3 VERIFIED: Salary data persists correctly when fetching from backend - GET /api/hr/employees/{id}/salary returns saved data
seed_data_creation: Test document uploaded with PDF file to verify document_url -> file_url mapping
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three UAT bugs have been fixed and verified. Password fix preserves valid bcrypt hashes. Document fix maps document_url to file_url in ESS. Salary fix ensures data persistence.

bug_1_password_reset.issue: Passwords were being reset to password123 on every server restart
bug_1_password_reset.fix_description: auto_fix_password_hashes() now only fixes corrupted/missing hashes, not valid custom passwords
verification: Valid bcrypt hashes are preserved (not reset)

bug_2_documents_in_ess.issue: Documents not showing in ESS mobile app
bug_2_documents_in_ess.fix_description: ESS API now checks url OR document_url OR file_url fields
verification: Document uploaded via CRM stores URL in document_url field
ESS endpoint correctly maps document_url to file_url
file_url is populated in ESS response when document has URL

bug_3_salary_persistence.issue: Salary tab data not persisting when switching tabs in CRM
bug_3_salary_persistence.fix_description: Added useEffect to reload salary when switching to salary tab
